summary: These prompts revolve around surreal, pop-culture-mashup imagery rendered in highly specific visual styles (film stills/posters, album covers, hyperreal 3D/Octane/UE5, tattoo stencils, and fine-art pastiche like “by Martin Johnson Heade”), featuring celebrities, robots/cyberpunk and biomechanical motifs, odd anthropomorphic animals, horror/folk-horror monsters, imaginative architecture/interiors, and fantastical alien or natural landscapes.
